title: Password Security for Remote Workers
content:
With the rise of remote work, maintaining strong password security is more critical than ever. Working from home or public spaces exposes employees to unique security risks that can compromise sensitive company data.

To protect your accounts, always use strong, unique passwords for every service, enable multi-factor authentication (MFA), and avoid sharing passwords over insecure channels like chat or email.

Recommended Tools

  • 1Password: A secure password manager that helps remote teams share credentials safely.
  • Bitwarden: An open-source password manager offering robust encryption and cross-platform support.
